mapper.sql: select id, namespace, service_name, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from monitor_microservice_service
mapper.select: where namespace = #{namespace} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc
mapper.update: update monitor_microservice_service set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where namespace = #{namespace} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into monitor_microservice_service(namespace, service_name, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values(#{namespace}, #{serviceName}, #{sortOrder}, '0', #{createBy}, now())
